name: Charcoaled Chuck Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 to 3 to 3 1/2 lb boneless chuck roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle one side of the roast with 1 teaspoon meat tenderizer.
2. Pierce the meat deeply with a fork and turn it over.
3. Repeat step 1 on the other side of the roast.
4. Let the roast stand for 30 minutes.
5. In a 2-quart glass baking dish, combine vinegar, olive oil, lemon juice, onion, thyme, and bay leaf.
6. Add the roast and turn to coat evenly. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least six hours or overnight, turning the roast periodically and spooning marinade over it.
7. Light charcoal in an outdoor grill.
8. Discard the marinade and scrape off any onion and herbs from the meat to prevent burning.
9. Sprinkle the meat with pepper and place it back in the dish. Cover again.
10. Microwave on high for 5 minutes, then turn the roast over and microwave for another 5 minutes more.
11. Immediately grill over hot coals for 30 to 40 minutes for medium doneness.
12. Slice the meat diagonally and serve juices alongside the meat.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
